children.text: This exotic meal bowl comes with boneless chicken leg cooked in rich Rendang curry, finished with creamy coconut milk leaving it tender and juicy. Chicken is accompanied with fresh veggies and aromatic rice.

This dish harbours a myriad of flavourful ingredients. Tender chicken drumstick marinated in parsley, chilli, garlic, lemon and cooked to perfection. It is served with smoky BBQ rice and golden fried potato wedges. Go ahead and dig right in.
Grilled Chicken with Walnut Pesto (Non Veg)
Grilled Chicken with Walnut Pesto (Non Veg)

Pesto is an ageless benchmark of the legendary Italian cuisine. Today we have one-of-a-kind spaghetti meal made with a nutty and savoury walnut pesto sauce with perfectly charred grilled chicken. Served with veggies on the side.
Hoisin Glazed Chicken Rice Bowl (Non Veg)
Hoisin Glazed Chicken Rice Bowl (Non Veg)

This East Asian delight is a delicate balance of oriental flavours. Juicy boneless leg of chicken is grilled and glazed in hoisin sauce to give it a sweet and salty flavour. This is served with aromatic fried rice and will have you savouring each bite to the fullest.
Chimichurri Baby Pomfret Rice Pot (Non Veg)
Chimichurri Baby Pomfret Rice Pot (Non Veg)

This Argentinian inspired dish comes with Pomfret marinated in a spicy cilantro chimichurri and cooked to perfection in the oven. This is topped with more chimichurri and served on a bed of cheesy bell pepper rice. Go ahead and give this new-on-menu seafood dish a try!

Give your taste buds the relish they deserve with this perfect blend of aromatic, mouth-watering flavours! Sautéed and seasoned perfectly in aromatic herbs, this Thai Super bowl is a mixture of soft quinoa and pearl barley. It is made irresistible with a succulent boneless chicken leg tossed in thick Green Thai Curry and mushrooms while the fresh zucchini and leek lend their crunchiness.

Soups are a perfect way to start a meal. Today we bring you this delicious soup packed with fresh and vibrant flavours in an aromatic broth with juicy chicken dumplings, Asian spices and herbs. Dig right in.

This winter, let us keep you warm and cozy with our soup. This aromatic and soulful Tibetan winter broth comes with the goodness of ginger and coriander combined with pulled chicken and noodles. Perfect to keep cold at bay and stay fit for the coming days.

This salad is a great way to enjoy the rich seasonal produce. It comes with slices of orange marinated in habanero chilli spice with mixed lettuce, cherry tomatoes, salty olives and juicy pineapple dices. Protein- 3 g, Total Lipid (Fat)- 1 g, Carbohydrate- 44 g
Rainbow Burrito N Potato Wedges Meal-For-One
Rainbow Burrito N Potato Wedges Meal-For-One

Experience explosions of flavours with this meal-for-one, super-saver combo. Rainbow Burrito bowl comes with a medley of true-blue Mexican flavours. Flavourful coriander rice, sour cream, tangy tomato salsa is served with the goodness of stir fried zucchini, broccoli, bell peppers and spinach. We are giving the potato wedges a new profile with the magic of Moroccan spices. Binge on this appetizer which is dusted with Moroccan spice and topped with fresh parsley. Served with mayo.
Chicken Superbowl N Carrot Cake Meal-For-One
Chicken Superbowl N Carrot Cake Meal-For-One

Experience explosions of flavours with this meal-for-one, super-saver combo. Sautéed and seasoned perfectly in aromatic herbs, this Thai Super bowl is a mixture of soft quinoa and pearl barley. It is made irresistible with a succulent boneless chicken leg tossed in thick Green Thai Curry and mushrooms while the fresh zucchini and leek lend their crunchiness. Then comes our Carrot cake which comes with rich butter flavoured sweet carrot and walnut cake with pockets of golden raisins, slow baked to softness and to maintain the golden touch. Served with spiced cheese cream.
Burrito with Gnocchi N Potato Wedges Meal-For-Two
Burrito with Gnocchi N Potato Wedges Meal-For-Two

Give your taste buds the relish they deserve with this perfect blend of aromatic, mouth-watering flavours with this meal-for-two, super saver combo. Rainbow Burrito bowl comes with a medley of true-blue Mexican flavours. Flavourful coriander rice, sour cream, tangy tomato salsa is served with the goodness of stir fried zucchini, broccoli, bell peppers and spinach. The gnocchi pasta made from potato is tossed in basil pesto sauce with parmesan, crunchy diced bell peppers and fresh zucchini. Finished with parmesan shavings. We are giving the potato wedges a new profile with the magic of Moroccan spices. Binge on this appetizer which is dusted with Moroccan spice and topped with fresh parsley. Served with mayo.
This rich cake melts in your mouth the moment you take a bite of it. A dense American chocolate cake, comes with a moist centre and a crusty head, topped with Oreo vanilla and chocolate cookies.

A smooth layer of strawberry marshmallow, sandwiched between fine layers of classic British Vanilla pound cake, coated with dark chocolate and rolled in finely grated white chocolate. The combination melts to the last bite!
Rich butter flavoured sweet carrot and walnut cake with pockets of golden raisins, slow baked to softness and to maintain the golden touch. Served with spiced cheese cream.
This order will be delivered after 12 PM
Items will be available only after 12 PM. Pre order now.
